## Summary

Describe the learner or contributor outcome of this change.

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm format:check`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm worker:typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm schema:check`
- [ ] `pnpm validate:content`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm test:worker`
- [ ] `pnpm license:check`
- [ ] `pnpm build`

Run the relevant end-to-end and accessibility checks for interface changes.

## Governance review

- [ ] I read `CONSTITUTION.md`.
- [ ] New external software, sources, media, quotations, datasets, Actions, or
      trademarks are registered in `docs/THIRD_PARTY_RESOURCES.md`.
- [ ] I did not include real suspicious links, unnecessary personal data, or
      material I cannot license.
- [ ] Case changes follow `docs/CASE_REVIEW_CHECKLIST.md`.
- [ ] Code and original educational content use the repository's stated
      Apache-2.0 and CC BY-SA 4.0 contribution terms.

## Sources and review notes

List factual sources, permission details, sensitive-content considerations,
and any follow-up review still required.
